---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, API, or behavior.
title: ""
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Before filing: check the doc site at https://docs.activegraph.ai
(especially the v1.1 backlog in CONTRACT.md and v1.1-plan.md — the
request may already be tracked there) and CONTRIBUTING.md for the
contribution policy.

The framework is in its early public phase. Code PRs are
maintainer-only with an issue-first discussion gate; this issue is
the discussion. Lead with the problem you are trying to solve, not
the solution you have in mind.
-->

## Problem statement

<!--
What are you trying to accomplish? Describe the goal in terms of
the outcome you want, independent of any specific framework
mechanism.
-->

## Current workaround

<!--
What are you doing today to work around the gap? Code snippets
are welcome. If there is no workaround and you are blocked, say
so.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
What would you like to be different? This can be vague (a shape
or a direction) or concrete (a specific API). Concrete proposals
are easier to evaluate against the contract; vague ones leave more
room for the maintainers to suggest an alternative shape.
-->

## Open questions

<!--
Anything you are unsure about — naming, scope, backward
compatibility, interaction with an existing primitive. The
maintainers will likely have additional questions; surfacing yours
early shortens the discussion loop.
-->
